caption: [Beowulf](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Beowulf)'s eotenas ond ylfe ond orcneas, "ogres and elves and devil-corpses" helped to inspire Tolkien to create the [Orcs](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Orc) and [Elves](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Elf_%28Middle-earth%29) of [Middle-earth](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Middle-earth).[\[21\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Lord_of_the_Rings#cite_note-Shippey_2005_Beowulf-33)
alt: [Beowulf](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Beowulf)'s eotenas ond ylfe ond orcneas, "ogres and elves and devil-corpses" helped to inspire Tolkien to create the [Orcs](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Orc) and [Elves](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Elf_%28Middle-earth%29) of [Middle-earth](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Middle-earth).[\[21\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Lord_of_the_Rings#cite_note-Shippey_2005_Beowulf-33)
